name: floci
description: Floci is a fast, free, and open-source local AWS service emulator built for developers who need reliable AWS services in development and CI without cost, complexity, or vendor lock-in.
To use, set environment variable AWS_ENDPOINT_URL to http://localhost:4566 and match AWS_DEFAULT_REGION, AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID and AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY to the values in the compose file.
